name: South of Tent
description: An open field south of the tent. Tall grass sways gently. The tent's back wall is visible but has no entrance.
ambient: A patch of flattened grass suggests someone sat here recently.
The canvas back wall shows a small, stitched repair.

interaction_rules.text: The grass is cool and springy. The flattened patch is still slightly warm.
The stitching is neat but done with a heavy, dark thread—almost like sinew.
